portfolio.rationale: Strongest momentum proxy with broad AI-driven leadership; relief rally on Iran de-escalation and falling VIX favors high-beta tech into FOMC.
Mega-cap growth leadership confirmed by +3.06% Nasdaq move; benefits from easing geopolitical risk and stable rates.
Momentum factor leading all factors; trend persistence likely into a risk-on, de-escalation week.
Semiconductor-heavy with explosive recent momentum; geopolitical relief supports export/chip cyclicals.
Cyclical risk-on participation with steady curve; broad rally breadth supports financials into FOMC hold.

portfolio_rationale: Risk-on tilt to high-beta tech and momentum leaders to capture continuation of the relief rally driven by Iran de-escalation, falling oil, and a low VIX, while a held Fed reduces rate shock risk over the short window.
rationale_summary: Concentrate in semiconductors, Nasdaq, and momentum with a chip-country and financials cyclical kicker to maximize alpha versus SPY in a risk-on week.
